assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration includes recurring_window with Saturday schedule (FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA) and the gcloud script sets up weekend maintenance with --recurring-window-recurrence

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The bash script includes gcloud commands with --recurring-window-start, --recurring-window-end, and --recurring-window-recurrence="FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA"

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: While quarterly exclusions are configured, the periods defined (March 25-April 5, June 25-July 5, etc.) are only about 10-11 days each, not utilizing the full 30-day capability mentioned in the expectation

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Both Terraform and gcloud configurations include November audit exclusions covering the entire month (November 1-30)

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and auto-upgrades regarding maintenance window enforcement

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration uses 'REGULAR' channel, and there's no discussion of Stable or Extended channels for enhanced upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The bash script includes the add_maintenance_exclusion function with gcloud commands using --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
